programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: Doctors Jonathan Papson and Emma West worry a mechanic could lose his crushed arm. Dr Luke De La Rue’s decision not to ride a bike in the city is reinforced when treating a cyclist with a horrifically mangled ankle after being hit by a car.

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.

programme.title: Real Emergency: Episode
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: At The Royal Melbourne Hospital, Dr Jonathan Papson discovers devastating news for an injured driver. Drs Andrew Wallace and Emma West fear a chef, who fell down an escalator, has brain injuries. Otto wins hearts and cuddles in the office.

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.
